type: Qualitative Comparison Grid（论文级多方法多样本对比网格）
goal: 生成一张可直接放进论文 qualitative results 章节的文生图对比网格，严格对齐、Ours 列深红细边框、英文列首

grid.cell_size_rule: all cells identical size; gap between cells 4-6px

column_headers.style: centered above each column, sans-serif bold 11pt, citations in [brackets]

items: Prompt A: “a photorealistic red fox in snow, 85mm, shallow DoF”
Prompt B: “futuristic Tokyo alley at night, neon, rain, cinematic”
Prompt C: “ceramic mug on oak table, morning window light, product shot”
Prompt D: “watercolor botanical illustration, eucalyptus leaves, white background”
row_labels.style: left margin, 10pt compact sans, two lines max per label

options_explained.note: Col1: monospace text box rendering the prompt; Col2–5: model outputs for that row's prompt

cell_content.consistency_rule: each row shows the same prompt in column 1 and all generated images reflect that text only

ours_column.style: thicker border 1.5px in deep red #DC2626 around each Ours cell

caption.label: Figure 5.
caption.text: Qualitative text-to-image comparison on fixed prompts. Our method (last column) better preserves specular highlights and text–image alignment; see supp. for more seeds.
caption.style: below the grid, italic smaller sans, justified

must_keep: same semantic scene per row across methods
no decorative gradients in grid background
